{{Infobox group
| name = Cablewright Genetics
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Cablewright Genetics]] is a company that makes weapons designed to hunt, eat, and lay eggs.}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Cablewright Genetics]] is a subsidiary of the [[Vallenar Corporation]].}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
